articles.title: US jet fuel could be used in Europe to ease possible shortages - BBC
articles.description: An international air body suggests wider acceptance of US-grade jet fuel could help to head off any supply problems.
articles.content: He added that airlines in North America use Jet A every day, but still manage to serve communities in very cold regions, such as parts of Alaska, by using fuel additives, as well as by planning and m… [+63 chars]
